chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-2061 of 2018 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 20.11.2025 Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri, Assistant A.G Sindh *** None present for the petitioner. No intimation is received. Same was the position on the last date of hearing. The conduct displayed by the petitioner prima facie reflects that he has lost interest in the matter. Accordingly this petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
